entries.source: "Check my essay thesis"
entries.value: "Kontroleer die stelling van my opstel"

entries.source: "Give me a hint for this physics problem"
entries.value: "Gee my 'n wenk vir hierdie fisikaprobleem"

entries.source: "Help me start this word problem"
entries.value: "Help my met hierdie redaksiesom te begin"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Homework Coach on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van Homework Coach op inspir vir gefokusde oefening, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck on homework with hints, examples, and checks that help you do the thinking yourself.
entries.value: AI-huiswerkafrigter met wenke, geen antwoorddump, is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: kom los by huiswerk met wenke, voorbeelde en kontroles wat jy help self te bly dink.

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping: practical guide
entries.value: AI-huiswerkafrigter met wenke, geen antwoorddump: praktiese gids

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Find the next step.
entries.value: Vind die volgende stap.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: Homework Coach
entries.value: Huiswerkafrigter

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Oefen

entries.source: Practice a similar problem.
entries.value: Oefen 'n vergelykbaar probleem.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Start the live mode at Homework Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Math Step Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by Homework Coach. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Math Step Coach. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Students who need help starting a problem, checking work, or understanding a mistake.
entries.value: Studente wat hulp nodig het om met 'n probleem te begin, werk na te gaan of 'n fout te verstaan.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Die afrigter ondersteun jou denke sonder om die opdrag oor te neem, sodat die finale werk joune bly.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Understand the mistake.
entries.value: Begrijp die fout.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik Homework Coach wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
